annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Ind. Code § 24-4.6-1-101 — 8% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). This 8% is POST-judgment (from verdict/finding to satisfaction). Prejudgment interest is separate — under the Tort Prejudgment Interest Statute, Ind.… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
